content: s6-overlay v3.2.3.0 (May 2026). Two supported layouts: (1) Compat/v2: /etc/services.d/{service}/run + /etc/services.d/{service}/finish - HA official example add-on uses this. (2) Native v3: /etc/s6-overlay/s6-rc.d/{service}/ with type, run, finish, dependencies.d/ files, then register in /etc/s6-overlay/s6-rc.d/user/contents.d/{service}. One-time init scripts go in /etc/cont-init.d/. Script shebang: #!/usr/bin/with-contenv bashio or #!/usr/bin/with-contenv sh. Container ENTRYPOINT is /init (set by base image). Add-on config needs init: false.
